headline: Top 2 Real Estate Stocks That May Crash This Month
summary: Real estate sector sees 2 overbought stocks, RLJ Lodging (NYSE: RLJ) and Host Hotels (NASDAQ: HST). Strong earnings and higher RSI values signal momentum.
